<!-- PR Template for Kouzhi Integration -->
## Summary
- Briefly describe the change and its motivation.
- What problem does it solve? Why is this approach chosen?

## Changes
- List of files added/modified with high-level descriptions.
- Any new dependencies or schema changes.

## Validation & Testing
- How to reproduce and verify the changes locally.
- Testing performed (unit, integration, e2e).
- CI status and test results (if available).

## Migration / Backward Compatibility
- Any migration steps required for existing users or components.
- Backward compatibility considerations.

## Rollback Plan
- If issues arise, how to revert safely.

## Notes
- Any other relevant notes for reviewers.
